tool_input.command:
for avd in virtualAndroid virtualAndroid2 virtualAndroid3; do
  snapshots_dir="/c/Users/Administrator/.android/avd/${avd}.avd/snapshots/qa-ready"
  if [ -d "$snapshots_dir" ]; then
    size=$(du -sh "$snapshots_dir" 2>/dev/null | cut -f1)
    echo "$avd.avd/snapshots/qa-ready: $size"
  else
    echo "$avd.avd/snapshots/qa-ready: NOT FOUND"
  fi
done
